Name: Datadog - Create Event
Description: Datadog is cloud monitoring service which allows you to push arbitrary events into via an api.  This task allows you to create an event to correlate with other data.

Parameters.Name: ApiKey
Parameters.Label: Datadog Api Key
Parameters.HelpText: The api key used to authenticate with Datadog.

Parameters.Name: EventTitle
Parameters.Label: Title
Parameters.HelpText: The title for the event to publish.

Parameters.Name: EventBody
Parameters.Label: Body
Parameters.HelpText: The text to provide more information about the event.

Parameters.Name: AlertType
Parameters.Label: Alert Type
Parameters.HelpText: The alert type out of the following options: "error", "warning", "info" or "success".

Parameters.Name: Priority
Parameters.Label: Priority
Parameters.HelpText: The priority out of the following: "normal" or "low".

Parameters.Name: Tags
Parameters.Label: Tags
Parameters.HelpText: A comma separated list of tags to identify the event.

Parameters.Name: DatadogEndpoint
Parameters.Label: Datadog Endpoint
Parameters.HelpText: The endpoint for datadog, for most (if not all) instances this should just be "https://app.datadoghq.com"
